changes.summary: Deleted unused REST PermissionGuard (354 lines). No controllers import PermissionGuard or @RequirePermission; authorization is enforced via trpc permission.middleware.ts per GUARD_MIGRATION_STATUS.md.

Removed duplicate orphaned Nest telegram service tree (4 services, ~17KB). Logic lives in TgBotsModule/TgBotsService and @common/extapis/telegram types; these files were never registered in any module.

verifyJWT_export.reason: Outside write_set; knip still reports verifyJWT as unused export. signJWT remains used by auth.service and jwt-service.util.

notes: DAG write_set listed api/apps/meriter/src/api-v1/common/guards/permission.guard.ts but the dead guard lived at api/apps/meriter/src/permission.guard.ts (knip-confirmed unused). Empty src/telegram/ directory removed after file deletions.
